question: Who took over as UK defence secretary after the minister who quit over armed forces funding in June 2026?

openrouter:anthropic/claude-sonnet-5.answer:
John Healey resigned as UK Defence Secretary on 11 June 2026 over a dispute with Prime Minister Keir Starmer regarding insufficient military spending. He was succeeded by **Dan Jarvis**, who had been serving as security minister and was named Healey's successor that same evening.

Source: The Guardian, https://www.theguardian.com/politics/2026/jun/11/john-healey-resigns-defence-secretary-military-spending

openrouter:openai/gpt-5.6-sol.answer:
Dan Jarvis, previously the UK security minister, took over as defence secretary after John Healey resigned in June 2026 over armed forces funding.

Source: [Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/world/uk/british-defence-minister-healey-resigns-over-defence-spending-2026-06-11/)

took over as UK defence secretary after the minister who quit over armed forces funding in June 2026
